series_metadata.series_description: Reports generated by VR Administration on a monthly, quarterly or annual basis that are submitted to the Federal Rehabilitation Services Administration (RSA) to provide indicators on performance. Records may include: RSA-911 Case Service Report - Annual/ RSA-113 Quarterly Cumulative Caseload Report; RSA-722 Annual Report on Appeal Process; RSA-704 State Independent Living Service annual report; RSA-2 Vocational Rehabilitation Programs/Cost Report - Annual; RSA-7-0B Independent Living Services for Older Individuals Who are blind; and any additional report generated by administration for similar purposes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) federal fiscal years from fiscal year generated. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: two (2) federal fiscal years from fiscal year generated. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
